input.title: Input Requests
input.description: List of review-scrape requests — identical format to the Axesso actor input. Each entry needs: asin, domainCode, filterByStar, maxPages, sortBy, reviewerType, formatType, mediaType.

maxBudgetUsd.title: Max Budget (USD)
maxBudgetUsd.description: Optional hard cap on Axesso API spend per run. Leave blank for no cap.

filterMode.title: Filter Mode
filterMode.description: Strict (recommended): keep only statusCode=200 + statusMessage=FOUND rows. Lenient: only remove NO_REVIEWS_PENALTY placeholder rows.

ownerToken.title: Your Apify API Token
ownerToken.description: Required when running this actor from the Apify Store (another account's actor context). Provide your own Apify API token so the actor can call the Axesso sub-actor on your behalf. Find your token at https://console.apify.com/settings/integrations. Stored securely and never logged.
